message:
fix(tui): Extract score indicator to widget and optimize contextual_snippet

TUI Score Rendering:
- Remove inline score_style() and score_bar() functions from tui.rs
- Import and use score_indicator() from shared widgets module
- This deduplicates the score rendering logic that was copied inline

Contextual Snippet Performance:
- Rewrite contextual_snippet() to avoid allocating full char vector upfront
- Use chars().count() for length check without allocation
- For texts under 100KB: use case-insensitive matching with to_lowercase()
- For texts over 100KB: fall back to case-sensitive search to avoid
  huge allocation from lowercasing large texts
- Map byte index to char index for proper Unicode centering
- Use chars().skip().take().collect() instead of slice indexing on
  pre-allocated char vector

The snippet optimization addresses memory pressure when processing
large session content, particularly relevant for the search results
view where many snippets may be generated in rapid succession.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
